mapper.sql: id, name, code, leader, parent_id, status, description, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from sys_department order by coalesce(parent_id, 0) asc, case when parent_id is null or parent_id = 0 then 0 else 1 end asc, id asc
select from sys_department where status = #{status} order by coalesce(parent_id, 0) asc, case when parent_id is null or parent_id = 0 then 0 else 1 end asc, id asc

select from sys_department
order by coalesce(parent_id, 0) asc, case when parent_id is null or parent_id = 0 then 0 else 1 end asc, id asc limit #{query.safeSize} offset #{query.offset}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_department (name, code, leader, parent_id, status, description, created_at, updated_at) values (#{name}, #{code}, #{leader}, #{parentId}, #{status}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update sys_department set name = #{name}, code = #{code}, leader = #{leader}, parent_id = #{parentId}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}

where.if: and ( name ilike concat('%', #{query.normalizedKeyword}, '%') or code ilike concat('%', #{query.normalizedKeyword}, '%') or leader ilike concat('%', #{query.normalizedKeyword}, '%') or description ilike concat('%', #{query.normalizedKeyword}, '%') )

and ( name ilike concat('%', #{query.normalizedKeyword}, '%') or code ilike concat('%', #{query.normalizedKeyword}, '%') or leader ilike concat('%', #{query.normalizedKeyword}, '%') or description ilike concat('%', #{query.normalizedKeyword}, '%') )
